notes: Solid breakout implementation with proper brick colors/values, paddle angle control, and level progression, but the overlay text persists during gameplay after life-loss messages and the launch angle (240-300°) sends the ball downward initially which is a logic bug.
Excellent core gameplay and mechanics, but the overlay text fails to clear after launching the ball following a lost life or level up, leaving text permanently on screen during gameplay.
Core Breakout loop is implemented and stable, but launch/start flow is inconsistent with the on-screen prompt and ball/brick collision handling is fairly simplistic, which hurts reliability and feel.
